sections.content: Game over triggered! Need to check if this is recoverable or if I need to restart. Let me inspect the current state and try to recover.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
n_blocks = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'N']
g_objects = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'G']
print(f"N blocks: {len(n_blocks)}")
print(f"G objects: {len(g_objects)}")

# Check progress bar
p_blocks = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'p']
for p in p_blocks:
    print(f"P block: pixels={p['pixels']}, boundary={p['boundary']}")

# Try moving player to see if game_over clears
result = action(['LEFT'])
print(f"\nAfter LEFT: game_over={result.get('game_over', False)}")

seg2 = current_frame.segmentation
n_blocks2 = [n for n in seg2['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'N']
print(f"N blocks after: {len(n_blocks2)}")

# Check ascii
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\nN block area:")
for r in range(24, 37):
    print(f"  Row {r}: {ascii_lines[r][12:55]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
